items.title: Git Repository Lock Management Interface
items.alt: A dark-themed modal dialog showing Git repository lock status during AI processing, displaying locker details and offering refresh or force unlock options.
items.description: A dark-themed modal dialog showing Git repository lock status during AI processing, displaying locker details and offering refresh or force unlock options.

items.title: Event Tracking API Secondary Confirmation Dialog
items.alt: A secondary confirmation dialog warning users about repeated confirmations within a short period, with options to continue or cancel.
items.description: A secondary confirmation dialog warning users about repeated confirmations within a short period, with options to continue or cancel.

items.title: GitHub Actions workflow editor with YAML configuration
items.alt: A GitHub web interface showing an AI Commit Agent workflow YAML configuration with proposed changes in green.
items.description: A GitHub web interface showing an AI Commit Agent workflow YAML configuration with proposed changes in green.

items.title: Version Management Dashboard with Git Commit Details
items.alt: A version management dashboard displaying software versions (1.0.0, 1.0.1) with release dates and git commit details including author newbe36524 on branch main.
items.description: A version management dashboard displaying software versions (1.0.0, 1.0.1) with release dates and git commit details including author newbe36524 on branch main.

items.title: HagiCode Service Dashboard with Start Service Button
items.alt: HagiCode v0.1.0 desktop application dashboard showing the service management panel with a start service button, blog section, and version information in a dark theme interface.
items.description: HagiCode v0.1.0 desktop application dashboard showing the service management panel with a start service button, blog section, and version information in a dark theme interface.

items.title: AI Compose Commit - Sub-repository Selection in GitHub Actions

items.title: GitHub Create Branch Dialog
items.alt: GitHub interface for creating a new branch named 'create-an-issue-branch' with repository branch selector dropdown open.

items.title: GitHub Desktop Repository Status View - HagiCode Mono Project
items.alt: GitHub Desktop dark theme interface showing the hagicode-mono project with 11 repositories and their change status indicators.
items.description: GitHub Desktop dark theme interface showing the hagicode-mono project with 11 repositories and their change status indicators.

items.title: HagiCode task list with avatar menu highlighted
items.alt: A dark green HagiCode interface shows a list of items with Chinese titles and green Execution Complete badges, while a red arrow points to the top avatar dropdown.
items.description: A dark green HagiCode interface shows a list of items with Chinese titles and green Execution Complete badges, while a red arrow points to the top avatar dropdown.

items.title: HagiCode presets panel with hero selection
items.alt: A dark HagiCode interface shows a Presets panel for chatting with a hero, with provider tabs, avatar cards, and a session list with status badges on the left.
items.description: A dark HagiCode interface shows a Presets panel for chatting with a hero, with provider tabs, avatar cards, and a session list with status badges on the left.

items.title: Dark-themed chat session with agent status panel
items.alt: A dark green chat UI shows a new session conversation, used tool badges, a running execution status card, top action buttons, and a message input bar.
items.description: A dark green chat UI shows a new session conversation, used tool badges, a running execution status card, top action buttons, and a message input bar.

items.title: Dark UI message composer with toggle controls
items.alt: A dark-themed app screen shows a sidebar of status cards and a bottom message composer with a highlighted toggle switch, action icons, and a send button.
items.description: A dark-themed app screen shows a sidebar of status cards and a bottom message composer with a highlighted toggle switch, action icons, and a send button.

items.title: Dark chat interface with image upload and toggle switch
items.alt: A dark green chat screen shows an uploaded image file, a message input with send button, status cards, and a red arrow pointing to a toggle switch beside the toolbar icons.
items.description: A dark green chat screen shows an uploaded image file, a message input with send button, status cards, and a red arrow pointing to a toggle switch beside the toolbar icons.

items.title: Initialization Wizard Language and Theme Setup
items.alt: Dark onboarding screen shows language selection, theme choice, and component readiness before creating a Hagicode workspace.
items.description: Dark onboarding screen shows language selection, theme choice, and component readiness before creating a Hagicode workspace.

items.title: Onboarding Dependency Check Panel
items.alt: Dark onboarding wizard verifies Node.js, npm, Git, and OpenSpec versions with selectable agent defaults in Chinese UI.
items.description: Dark onboarding wizard verifies Node.js, npm, Git, and OpenSpec versions with selectable agent defaults in Chinese UI.

items.title: Default Agent Setup Wizard
items.alt: Dark onboarding wizard panel shows default agent instructions with dropdowns selecting Claude Code AgentCLI and GLM 5.1 model plus a hero image and confirm button.
items.description: Dark onboarding wizard panel shows default agent instructions with dropdowns selecting Claude Code AgentCLI and GLM 5.1 model plus a hero image and confirm button.

items.title: Achievements dashboard with daily and global progress
items.alt: Dark achievement hall screen showing daily and global tabs, progress cards, cycle status, online growth, and proposal lifecycle metrics.
items.description: Dark achievement hall screen showing daily and global tabs, progress cards, cycle status, online growth, and proposal lifecycle metrics.

items.title: HagiCode proposal workflow execution completed view
items.alt: Dark HagiCode interface showing a proposal session with the workflow stepper on Completed and an execution finished panel, session details, and sidebar history.
items.description: Dark HagiCode interface showing a proposal session with the workflow stepper on Completed and an execution finished panel, session details, and sidebar history.

items.title: HagiCode session complete view with commit details
items.alt: Dark HagiCode interface showing a completed session, commit notes in the main panel, a session list sidebar, and top navigation actions like Agents, Wizard, and Refresh.
items.description: Dark HagiCode interface showing a completed session, commit notes in the main panel, a session list sidebar, and top navigation actions like Agents, Wizard, and Refresh.

items.title: Code Server Runtime Summary and Recent Launches

items.description: A dark admin-style panel shows a code-server runtime summary, base URL, last started time, and a list of recent launches with Reopen buttons.

items.title: New Idea drawer with repository selection and preview
items.alt: Dark admin UI showing a New Idea form with project and repository scope selectors, a combined preview of target repositories, and a request box containing "update readme".
items.description: Dark admin UI showing a New Idea form with project and repository scope selectors, a combined preview of target repositories, and a request box containing "update readme".

items.title: Initialization wizard language settings screen
items.alt: Dark-themed setup wizard screen showing the Language step with English confirmed, Chinese options, AI language settings, and a completed progress sidebar.
items.description: Dark-themed setup wizard screen showing the Language step with English confirmed, Chinese options, AI language settings, and a completed progress sidebar.

items.description: Dark initialization wizard screen showing step progress 8/8 and community cards for GitHub, Discord, Bilibili, QQ Group, and an AI Replacement Calculator.

items.description: Dark onboarding wizard screen showing Node.js, npm, and OpenSpec marked installed, with progress at 8/8 and a green notice that all required components are ready.

items.title: Initialization wizard interface color theme screen

items.description: A dark admin-style initialization wizard shows the interface color theme step with light and dark theme cards, a left progress sidebar, and an 8/8 completion status.

items.title: Initialization wizard copy theme selection
items.alt: A dark initialization wizard screen shows the copy theme step with sidebar progress and selectable cards with large previews for AgentCLI Baseline and Fantasy Adventure.
items.description: A dark initialization wizard screen shows the copy theme step with sidebar progress and selectable cards with large previews for AgentCLI Baseline and Fantasy Adventure.

items.title: Initialization wizard AgentCLI setup dashboard
items.alt: A dark-themed initialization wizard screen shows AgentCLI setup and management with toggle cards for multiple CLI tools, a step sidebar, and progress marked 8/8.
items.description: A dark-themed initialization wizard screen shows AgentCLI setup and management with toggle cards for multiple CLI tools, a step sidebar, and progress marked 8/8.

items.title: Initialization wizard agent setup screen
items.alt: A dark initialization wizard shows completed setup steps, tag filters, and an agent configuration table with avatar, name, AgentCLI, model, and character template fields.
items.description: A dark initialization wizard shows completed setup steps, tag filters, and an agent configuration table with avatar, name, AgentCLI, model, and character template fields.

items.title: Initialization wizard agent assignment screen
items.alt: A dark-themed initialization wizard shows step 3 for binding agents to generate, execute, and archive jobs, with selected agent cards, a progress sidebar, and a create-and-continue button.
items.description: A dark-themed initialization wizard shows step 3 for binding agents to generate, execute, and archive jobs, with selected agent cards, a progress sidebar, and a create-and-continue button.

items.title: Initialization wizard fallback crew selection screen
items.alt: A dark-themed initialization wizard screen shows selected agents and a highlighted Step 4 section for setting the fallback crew before continuing.
items.description: A dark-themed initialization wizard screen shows selected agents and a highlighted Step 4 section for setting the fallback crew before continuing.

items.title: Initialization Wizard Create Project Screen
items.alt: Dark-themed initialization wizard screen showing existing projects, a sidebar step list, and a create project form with name, path, and description fields.
items.description: Dark-themed initialization wizard screen showing existing projects, a sidebar step list, and a create project form with name, path, and description fields.

items.title: Hydration reminder overlay with countdown and drink action
items.alt: A dark green reminder panel shows time remaining, the next reminder time, daily drink stats, and a prominent "Drink Now" button over a game-like interface.
items.description: A dark green reminder panel shows time remaining, the next reminder time, daily drink stats, and a prominent "Drink Now" button over a game-like interface.

items.title: HagiCode session kanban with fantasy task panel
items.alt: Dark HagiCode UI showing Pending, In Progress, and Archived session columns beside an Ember Keep panel with illustrated fantasy character task cards and progress bars.
items.description: Dark HagiCode UI showing Pending, In Progress, and Archived session columns beside an Ember Keep panel with illustrated fantasy character task cards and progress bars.

items.title: Skills page with local skills inventory
items.alt: Dark-themed skills management screen showing local skills, tabs, a search bar, refresh and update-all buttons, and a table with paths and update or uninstall actions.
items.description: Dark-themed skills management screen showing local skills, tabs, a search bar, refresh and update-all buttons, and a table with paths and update or uninstall actions.

items.title: Agents Workspace model creation screen
items.alt: Dark admin interface showing the Agents Workspace with model cards on the left and a Create Model form panel on the right.
items.description: Dark admin interface showing the Agents Workspace with model cards on the left and a Create Model form panel on the right.

items.title: OmniRoute integration settings dashboard
items.alt: Dark-themed settings screen for OmniRoute showing an enable toggle, API endpoint field, model integration switches, and runtime and catalog status cards.
items.description: Dark-themed settings screen for OmniRoute showing an enable toggle, API endpoint field, model integration switches, and runtime and catalog status cards.

items.title: Kanban Right Panel settings with project preview
items.alt: A settings screen shows Kanban Right Panel display options with Quick Operations Panel selected and a project preview card below.
items.description: A settings screen shows Kanban Right Panel display options with Quick Operations Panel selected and a project preview card below.

items.title: Adventure Squad dungeon roster editor
items.alt: Screenshot of the Adventure Squad workspace with tabbed navigation, dungeon proposal cards on the left, and a roster editor panel with status badges and assigned heroes on the right.
items.description: Screenshot of the Adventure Squad workspace with tabbed navigation, dungeon proposal cards on the left, and a roster editor panel with status badges and assigned heroes on the right.

items.title: HagiCode session dashboard with workflow tabs
items.alt: A HagiCode web app screen shows a left session list, top workflow tabs, and a completed Chinese session summary with status badges and a chat input area.
items.description: A HagiCode web app screen shows a left session list, top workflow tabs, and a completed Chinese session summary with status badges and a chat input area.

items.title: HagiCode session board with project details
items.alt: Light-themed HagiCode dashboard showing pending, in-progress, and archived sessions beside a project details panel with quick actions and repository status.
items.description: Light-themed HagiCode dashboard showing pending, in-progress, and archived sessions beside a project details panel with quick actions and repository status.

items.title: HagiCode session board and project status dashboard
items.alt: Light-themed HagiCode dashboard showing session columns for proposal, execution, and archived items beside quick actions and repository status panels.
items.description: Light-themed HagiCode dashboard showing session columns for proposal, execution, and archived items beside quick actions and repository status panels.

items.title: Adventure Squad hero roster and loadout dashboard
items.alt: A game-style management screen shows a hero roster grid, active squad member details, battle readiness, and profession loadout tuning panels.
items.description: A game-style management screen shows a hero roster grid, active squad member details, battle readiness, and profession loadout tuning panels.

items.title: Hero loadout and profession settings dashboard
items.alt: Light-themed dashboard showing an active squad member, battle readiness, level progress, and primary and secondary profession settings for Claude Code and GLM 4.7.
items.description: Light-themed dashboard showing an active squad member, battle readiness, level progress, and primary and secondary profession settings for Claude Code and GLM 4.7.

items.title: General settings screen with sidebar navigation
items.alt: A dark-themed settings interface shows a left navigation sidebar and general settings cards for AI language, session display, long-running alerts, and chat mode.
items.description: A dark-themed settings interface shows a left navigation sidebar and general settings cards for AI language, session display, long-running alerts, and chat mode.

items.title: Skills Gallery dark UI screen
items.alt: Dark-themed skills management screen with gallery tabs, a search field, source filters, and a table listing skills, sources, and install counts.
items.description: Dark-themed skills management screen with gallery tabs, a search field, source filters, and a table listing skills, sources, and install counts.

items.title: AI Monitoring Status Panel for Agent CLIs
items.alt: A dark AI Monitoring popover lists Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot, Kimi, DeepAgents, and Hermes with version, response time, last check, and healthy status.
items.description: A dark AI Monitoring popover lists Claude Code, Codex, GitHub Copilot, Kimi, DeepAgents, and Hermes with version, response time, last check, and healthy status.

items.title: Token throughput metrics overlay
items.alt: A dark metrics panel overlays a game-like interface, showing token throughput levels, real-time rates, recent API call history, and total token counters.
items.description: A dark metrics panel overlays a game-like interface, showing token throughput levels, real-time rates, recent API call history, and total token counters.

items.title: Vault workspace management screen
items.alt: Dark-themed vault workspace page showing registered user and system vault cards with add, edit, delete, and open code server actions.
items.description: Dark-themed vault workspace page showing registered user and system vault cards with add, edit, delete, and open code server actions.

items.title: HagiCode top navigation with the Skills entry
items.alt: The HagiCode workspace header shows the Skills button in the top navigation, highlighted with a red arrow so readers can see where the Skills panel opens.
items.description: The HagiCode workspace header shows the Skills button in the top navigation, highlighted with a red arrow so readers can see where the Skills panel opens.

items.title: Gallery tab with search results and installed locally badges
items.alt: The Gallery tab filters skills by search and trust source, then lists each result with its source, install count, and installed locally badges so users can distinguish browseable entries from already installed ones.
items.description: The Gallery tab filters skills by search and trust source, then lists each result with its source, install count, and installed locally badges so users can distinguish browseable entries from already installed ones.

items.title: Local Skills tab with installed skills and Update all summary
items.alt: The Local Skills tab lists installed skills, their source agents, and workspace paths while showing both the Update all control and a batch summary that reports 6 of 6 updates completed.
items.description: The Local Skills tab lists installed skills, their source agents, and workspace paths while showing both the Update all control and a batch summary that reports 6 of 6 updates completed.

items.title: Recommendation tab with personalized skill candidates
items.alt: The Recommendation tab shows hero selectors, generated query chips, and candidate cards so users can review which skills fit the current projects, repositories, and workspace roles before installing.
items.description: The Recommendation tab shows hero selectors, generated query chips, and candidate cards so users can review which skills fit the current projects, repositories, and workspace roles before installing.

items.title: Skill details panel with trust status and managed command
items.alt: The Skill Details panel shows the selected skill's source, install count, trust status, and the managed command HagiCode will run, helping users confirm what will be installed before they proceed.
items.description: The Skill Details panel shows the selected skill's source, install count, trust status, and the managed command HagiCode will run, helping users confirm what will be installed before they proceed.

items.title: Trusted Providers tab with provider rules and trust status
items.alt: The Trusted Providers tab explains the rule format and lists preset providers, prefix rules, trust status, and source examples so users can see why a source is labeled trusted.
items.description: The Trusted Providers tab explains the rule format and lists preset providers, prefix rules, trust status, and source examples so users can see why a source is labeled trusted.
